items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the 'Attribution expiry window support' requirement, but there is no concrete evidence provided that confirms its implementation or functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for this support, yet lacks specific details or evidence of how it is being tracked or enforced. This leads to an inconclusive status as the necessary data to validate the requirement is missing.
